distractors.off_target_set: Queries that clearly map to a single model; problems outside the thinking skills catalog; meta-questions about the router itself
distractors.description: Items where routing is trivial (one obvious model) or where the router should not be invoked (out of scope)

decision_gate.elevate: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_delta_pp >= 5 AND replication_paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_direction_matches_primary AND false_route_rate <= 0.10
decision_gate.directional_not_replicated: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND (replication_delta_pp < 5 OR replication_paired_test_p >= 0.05 OR replication_direction_opposite)
